childhood.familyBackground: South Korean family. Spouse of Kim Jung-joo, founder of Nexon Corporation.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 한국 가정. 넥슨의 창립자 김정주의 배우자
childhood.education: Education background not extensively documented in public sources
childhood.educationKo: 공개 자료에 광범위한 교육 배경이 기록되지 않음
childhood.earlyLife: Yoo Jung-hyun was born on April 16, 1969. She co-founded Nexon with husband Kim Jung-joo in December 1994 with initial capital of 60 million won. She served as manager of Management Support Division and as representative of Nexon Networks subsidiary, playing a crucial role in establishing the operational foundation for the company's growth.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1969년 4월 16일 태어난 유정현은 1994년 12월 남편 김정주와 함께 자본금 6,000만원으로 넥슨을 공동 창립했습니다. 경영지원본부장과 넥슨네트웍스 자회사 대표를 맡으면서 회사의 성장을 위한 경영 기반을 마련하는 데 핵심적인 역할을 했습니다.

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Nexon Corporation with husband Kim Jung-joo and Sung Jae-gyeong with initial capital of 60 million won
careerTimeline.eventKo: 남편 김정주, 송재경과 함께 자본금 6,000만원으로 넥슨 공동 창립

careerTimeline.event: Assumed role as Manager of Management Support Division at Nexon
Served as representative of Nexon Networks subsidiary during early online game expansion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 온라인 게임 초기 성장 과정에서 넥슨네트웍스 자회사 대표 역임

careerTimeline.event: Became auditor of NXC (Nexon's holding company)
Nexon Foundation established for social contribution activities
Appointed as inside director of NXC Board
Appointed as Chairman of NXC Board of Directors after inheriting shares; became Nexon Group's largest shareholder with 34% stake
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주식 상속 후 NXC 이사회 의장 선임, NXC 지분 34%로 최대주주 등극

personalTraits.knownFor: Co-founder and current Chairman of NXC, Nexon Corporation's holding company. Known as the widow of Nexon founder Kim Jung-joo and as a pioneering female leader in South Korea's gaming and entertainment industry. Recognized for her role in establishing operational foundations for Nexon's global success and her commitment to corporate social responsibility.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 넥슨의 지주회사 NXC의 공동창립자이자 현재 의장. 넥슨 창립자 김정주의 미망인으로서 한국 게임 및 엔터테인먼트 산업의 선구적인 여성 리더로 알려져 있습니다. 넥슨의 글로벌 성공을 위한 경영 기반 확립과 기업의 사회적 책임 활동으로 인정받고 있습니다.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Committed to social contribution activities through Nexon Foundation, supporting charitable initiatives and community development programs.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 넥슨재단을 통한 사회공헌 활동, 자선 사업 및 지역사회 발전 프로그램 지원
